allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Refactor captions component with lyrics-style display

- Extract template to separate captions.component.html
- Add lyrics-style caption display with all captions visible
- Implement auto-scroll to center current caption
- Add word context/AI translation with pronunciation and examples
- Add navigation methods \(previous/replay/next cue\)
- Auto-pause video on word click, resume on close
- Support auto_pause_after_caption setting
- Improve settings handling with async loading

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
